title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap Ollama models into any LangChain chain or agent.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (React/Flask) for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and user management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented-generation example that pairs Ollama with Chroma for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI for browsing, pulling, and chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to query Ollama models inside buffers for code explanation, generation, and refactoring.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that adds Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, embeddings, and tool-calling support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container inside CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes or selections via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt bot that answers channel questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-chroma-streamlit
summary: Streamlit app template combining Ollama for generation and Chroma for semantic search over uploaded documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama completions into threads with per-user rate limits.

title: ollama-llamaindex
summary: LlamaIndex integration allowing Ollama models to be used as LLM or embedder in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-docker-dev
summary: Docker Compose development stack with Ollama, Open-WebUI, Chroma, and GPU support for rapid prototyping.
